candidate_audit.summary: Rajasthan Royals aim for a crucial victory against Lucknow Super Giants to revive their playoff chances

candidate_audit.title: Catch-22: IPL 2026’s stunners and shockers
candidate_audit.summary: While there have been some screamers in the ongoing IPL season, the catching standard has been terrible to say the least; the repeat offenders are being heavily punished and so are their teams

candidate_audit.title: IPL 2026 DC vs RR: ‘Starc’s work ethic, preparation with his own plans, training are above par’, says Badani
candidate_audit.summary: Mitchell Starc reduced Rajasthan Royals to 166 for 5 in the space of an over and later dismissed Dasun Shanaka to finish with four wickets, a spell that ultimately proved decisive in DC’s five-wicket win

candidate_audit.title: IPL 2026 DC vs RR: ‘I don’t think slow ball is a weakness for Sooryavanshi,’ says Vikram Rathour
candidate_audit.summary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi fell to a slower delivery from Madhav Tiwari, not the first time a change of pace proved effective in dismissing the 15-year-old this season

candidate_audit.title: IPL 2026 DC vs RR | Starc’s mastery and batters’ fine show keep Capitals in the hunt
candidate_audit.summary: Starc’s superb 4/40 sparked a dramatic collapse after Rajasthan had stormed to 160 for two in 14 overs, with the visitors eventually managing only 33 runs while losing six wickets to finish at 193 for eight

candidate_audit.title: IPL 2026 CSK vs SRH | The intrigue over Dhoni hits fever pitch
candidate_audit.summary: Compared to previous match-eve sessions in Chennai, when he preferred to take mostly throwdowns, Dhoni faced off against bowlers for a sustained period on Sunday

candidate_audit.title: IPL 2026 PBKS vs RCB | Venkatesh, Bhuvneshwar do the star turn as RCB seals playoff spot
candidate_audit.summary: The left-hander makes the most of a rare opportunity to lift the defending champion to an above-par score; the veteran seamer’s early strikes and Hazlewood’s brilliance at the death leave PBKS on the brink of elimination

candidate_audit.title: IPL 2026 | Our X-factor pacers have come good: SRH bowling coach Aaron
candidate_audit.summary: Aaron hailed Heinrich Klaasen as the “fulcrum” of SRH’s batting line-up, praising his ability to adapt seamlessly in the middle-order

candidate_audit.title: IPL 2026 | Super Kings cross swords with Sunrisers in a must-win encounter
candidate_audit.summary: CSK may have to revisit its strategy of using three left-arm seamers — as it deployed against LSG — which makes the bowling attack one-dimensional

candidate_audit.title: IPL 2026: Allen, Raghuvanshi and Narine help Knight Riders stay alive
candidate_audit.summary: The opener slams a 35-ball 93; the No. 3 batter adds 108 off just 52 deliveries for the unbroken third wicket with Green to take the home team to 247; poor catching hurts Titans; the wily spinner returns figures of two for 29 to thwart the visitor

candidate_audit.title: IPL 2026 | When Jaiswal enjoys his batting, he does well: Sangakkara
candidate_audit.summary: Beyond the soaring sixes and growing hype around the teenager’s batting, RR head coach and director of cricket Kumar Sangakkara offered a glimpse of how the set-up balances Sooryavanshi’s bursts with Yashasvi Jaiswal’s struggles.

candidate_audit.title: MS Dhoni leaves CSK fans fearing last walk in Yellow after emotional thank you lap in Chepauk
candidate_audit.summary: MS Dhoni's presence at CSK's last home game of IPL 2026 evoked deep emotions, amid uncertainty over his future.

candidate_audit.title: One playoff spot, five teams: How PBKS, RR, CSK, DC and KKR can still qualify in chaotic IPL 2026 finish
candidate_audit.summary: The fight for the final IPL 2026 playoff spot is between PBKS, RR, CSK, DC and KKR. RCB, SRH and GT have already qualified for the playoffs.

candidate_audit.title: ‘Sanju Samson could be captain next year’: Brink-hit CSK urged to rethink Ruturaj Gaikwad after poor form
candidate_audit.summary: On a tricky Chepauk surface, Ruturaj Gaikwad struggled to 18 off 21 balls as Chennai lost by five wickets in their final home game of IPL 2026

candidate_audit.title: In IPL 2026, home advantage is a pipe dream
candidate_audit.summary: The broader numbers from the last two IPL seasons reveal an increasingly inconsistent picture across venues

candidate_audit.title: Why MS Dhoni’s long-awaited Chepauk return did not lead to IPL 2026 comeback for CSK in SRH game
candidate_audit.summary: MS Dhoni was present at the Chepauk Stadium on CSK's matchday for the first time this IPL season

candidate_audit.title: CSK vs SRH Highlights, IPL 2026: Kishan's 70 key as SRH win by five wickets, qualify for playoffs
candidate_audit.summary: CSK vs SRH Highlights, IPL 2026: Ishan Kishan's 47-ball 70 helped Sunrisers Hyderabad seal a five-wicket victory. SRH also became the third team to qualify for the playoffs, joining Gujarat Titans and Royal Challengers Bengaluru.

candidate_audit.title: Punjab Kings co-owner drops major WPL entry hint: ‘Not investing initially was never a lack of belief'
candidate_audit.summary: Women’s cricket has surged in popularity, especially after the launch of the Women’s Premier League (WPL) in 2023.

candidate_audit.title: KKR under BCCI's scrutiny for using Varun Chakaravarthy despite reported hairline fracture
candidate_audit.summary: KKR under scrutiny for using injured bowler Varun Chakravarthy during IPL 2026.

candidate_audit.title: MS Dhoni’s CSK return hopes dashed by Sunil Gavaskar even as Chepauk waits with bated breath
candidate_audit.summary: Sunil Gavaskar has ruled out MS Dhoni's participation in tonight's CSK vs SRH IPL 2026 game.

candidate_audit.title: IPL 2026: ‘My last T20 will be in Chennai,’ MS Dhoni's retirement shadow looms over CSK's final league game
candidate_audit.summary: MS Dhoni's potential participation in CSK's final home game of IPL 2026 against SRH raises anticipation.

candidate_audit.title: RCB's fate in CSK's hands: How the Super Kings vs Sunrisers can shape the IPL 2026 points table
candidate_audit.summary: The outcome of the CSK vs SRH match is crucial for playoff standings.

candidate_audit.title: Starc, openers shine in DC win as Royals playoffs anxiety grows
candidate_audit.summary: Delhi Capitals secured a much-needed win against Rajasthan Royals by five wickets, ending their home struggles in IPL 2026.

candidate_audit.title: IPL 2026: Allen rediscovers game, revives KKR’s hopes
candidate_audit.summary: The maturity in the Kiwi’s approach has altered the team’s batting shape at the business end of IPL 2026

candidate_audit.title: DC vs RR Highlights IPL 2026: DC stay alive as RR lose steam in qualification race; hosts' bowling shines
candidate_audit.summary: Delhi Capitals vs Rajasthan Royals Highlights IPL 2026: The teams lower down continue to force pressure on the midtable! DC restrict RR to 193 before a century opening stand lays the foundation for the chase, with Axar Patel and Ashutosh Sharma finishing it off to give DC consecutive wins.

candidate_audit.title: Why is Rajat Patidar not playing IPL 2026 match against Punjab Kings in Dharamsala?
candidate_audit.summary: RCB captain Rajat Patidar is out for the IPL 2026 match against PBKS, with Jitesh Sharma stepping in.

candidate_audit.title: PBKS vs RCB Highlights, IPL 2026: RCB become 1st team to qualify for playoffs, beat PBKS by 23 runs
candidate_audit.summary: PBKS vs RCB Highlights, IPL 2026: Rasikh Salam Dar took three wickets, Virat Kohli and Venkatesh Iyer got half-centuries as RCB defeated PBKS by 23 runs. The result also saw RCB become the first team to qualify for the playoffs.

candidate_audit.title: Why Punjab Kings don't look like the same team that started IPL 2026: Home venue change, poor fielding or bad luck
candidate_audit.summary: Punjab Kings have lost five consecutive matches after a strong start in IPL 2026, revealing issues in their batting and death bowling.

candidate_audit.title: Brutal burden on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi: Teenage shoulders carrying Rajasthan Royals’ playoff dreams a huge red flag
candidate_audit.summary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, a 15-year-old opener for Rajasthan Royals, has scored 440 runs in IPL 2026, significantly impacting the team's playoff chances.

candidate_audit.title: Ishan Kishan’s whistle taunt at Chepauk crowd goes viral after SRH beat CSK - Watch
candidate_audit.summary: Ishan Kishan's brilliant 70 powered Sunrisers Hyderabad into the playoffs, defeating Chennai Super Kings. After a match-winning performance, Kishan engaged with the home crowd with a celebratory gesture. He revealed his innings was motivated by his cousin's presence, who was there during a difficult family time. The wicketkeeper-batter emphasized his goal to finish the game for his family.

candidate_audit.title: ‘I felt blessed’: Ishan Kishan dedicates playoff-clinching knock to grieving cousin - Watch
candidate_audit.summary: Ishan Kishan's match-winning 70 against Sunrisers Hyderabad was fueled by a personal tragedy, as he aimed to finish the game for his grieving cousin present in the stands. Despite a challenging Chepauk pitch, Kishan's composed innings anchored SRH's chase, securing their playoff spot. He felt a sense of power, dedicating the victory to his family.

candidate_audit.title: One last time in yellow? MS Dhoni leaves Chepauk emotional after SRH defeat
candidate_audit.summary: Sunrisers Hyderabad defeated Chennai Super Kings at Chepauk. Fans remained long after the match. They hoped to see MS Dhoni one last time. Dhoni did not play due to fitness. His presence held significance beyond cricket. The crowd showed gratitude for his contributions. The possibility of his final appearance left many emotional.

candidate_audit.title: Madhav Tiwari: The ‘ziddi’ boy who only wanted to bat, but became a match-winner with the ball
candidate_audit.summary: Delhi Capitals youngster Madhav Tiwari has made an impressive start to his IPL 2026 journey, delivering impactful performances in his first two matches. The 22-year-old contributed with both bat and ball in crucial wins against Punjab Kings and Rajasthan Royals. But behind Madhav’s rise is the story of a stubborn youngster who only wanted to bat before former India cricketer Amay Khurasiya pushed him towards bowling as well. Today, that decision is helping Madhav emerge as an important player for Delhi Capitals in pressure situations.

candidate_audit.title: IPL 2026 Playoff Scenarios: With 7 matches to go, SRH and GT qualify; final spot up for grabs
candidate_audit.summary: With seven games left, Royal Challengers Bangalore, Gujarat Titans, and Sunrisers Hyderabad have secured playoff spots. Lucknow Super Giants and Mumbai Indians are out. Rajasthan Royals are in a strong position. Punjab Kings, Kolkata Knight Riders, Delhi Capitals, and Chennai Super Kings have slim hopes. The race for the remaining spots is intense with many possible outcomes.

candidate_audit.title: IPL 2026: SRH qualify for playoffs after beating CSK by 5 wickets
candidate_audit.summary: Sunrisers Hyderabad qualified for the IPL 2026 playoffs after a five-wicket win over Chennai Super Kings at Chepauk. Ishan Kishan scored 70 and added 75 runs with Heinrich Klaasen (47) in the chase of 181. Earlier, Pat Cummins starred with 3/28 as SRH joined Royal Challengers Bengaluru and Gujarat Titans in the playoffs.

candidate_audit.title: Ruturaj says CSK will return as 'stronger unit' as IPL 2026 playoff hopes fade
Watch: Dhoni enters field at Chepauk for final home appearance of IPL 2026
candidate_audit.summary: MS Dhoni thrilled Chepauk fans with a brief on-field appearance during CSK’s final home game of IPL 2026 against Sunrisers Hyderabad, despite missing the match through injury. The emotional moment came during the mid-innings team photo. Earlier, Ravi Shastri confirmed through Ruturaj Gaikwad that Dhoni was still unfit, while CSK managed 180/7 batting first.

candidate_audit.title: Punjab Kings contradict their physio's statement, say Arshdeep Singh 'fully fit'
'It doesn't matter whether Dhoni plays': Manjrekar gets brutally honest
candidate_audit.summary: Despite missing IPL 2026 due to multiple injuries, MS Dhoni remained the centre of attention for CSK. Former India batter Sanjay Manjrekar criticised the franchise for becoming too emotional over Dhoni instead of focusing on results and team balance. While praising Dhoni’s legacy, Manjrekar said CSK must prioritise performances and reality over sentiment moving forward.

candidate_audit.title: 'Dhoni, where is he?': Shashtri sends Chepauk crowd into frenzy- Watch
candidate_audit.summary: Former India coach Ravi Shastri sent Chepauk into a frenzy during the toss by asking Ruturaj Gaikwad if MS Dhoni would play against Sunrisers Hyderabad. The CSK skipper confirmed Dhoni is “not fit enough” due to a calf strain. The must-win IPL 2026 clash carried huge playoff implications for both CSK and SRH.

candidate_audit.summary: Dharamsala will stage Qualifier 1 while New Chandigarh will host the Eliminator and Qualifier 2

candidate_audit.title: In IPL 2026, home advantage is a pipe dream
candidate_audit.summary: The broader numbers from the last two IPL seasons reveal an increasingly inconsistent picture across venues

candidate_audit.title: Why MS Dhoni’s long-awaited Chepauk return did not lead to IPL 2026 comeback for CSK in SRH game
candidate_audit.summary: MS Dhoni was present at the Chepauk Stadium on CSK's matchday for the first time this IPL season

candidate_audit.title: CSK vs SRH Highlights, IPL 2026: Kishan's 70 key as SRH win by five wickets, qualify for playoffs
candidate_audit.summary: CSK vs SRH Highlights, IPL 2026: Ishan Kishan's 47-ball 70 helped Sunrisers Hyderabad seal a five-wicket victory. SRH also became the third team to qualify for the playoffs, joining Gujarat Titans and Royal Challengers Bengaluru.

candidate_audit.title: IPL 2026: ‘My last T20 will be in Chennai,’ MS Dhoni's retirement shadow looms over CSK's final league game
candidate_audit.summary: MS Dhoni's potential participation in CSK's final home game of IPL 2026 against SRH raises anticipation.

candidate_audit.title: RCB's fate in CSK's hands: How the Super Kings vs Sunrisers can shape the IPL 2026 points table
candidate_audit.summary: The outcome of the CSK vs SRH match is crucial for playoff standings.

candidate_audit.title: IPL 2026: Allen rediscovers game, revives KKR’s hopes
candidate_audit.summary: The maturity in the Kiwi’s approach has altered the team’s batting shape at the business end of IPL 2026

candidate_audit.title: DC vs RR Highlights IPL 2026: DC stay alive as RR lose steam in qualification race; hosts' bowling shines
candidate_audit.summary: Delhi Capitals vs Rajasthan Royals Highlights IPL 2026: The teams lower down continue to force pressure on the midtable! DC restrict RR to 193 before a century opening stand lays the foundation for the chase, with Axar Patel and Ashutosh Sharma finishing it off to give DC consecutive wins.

candidate_audit.title: Why is Rajat Patidar not playing IPL 2026 match against Punjab Kings in Dharamsala?
candidate_audit.summary: RCB captain Rajat Patidar is out for the IPL 2026 match against PBKS, with Jitesh Sharma stepping in.

candidate_audit.title: PBKS vs RCB Highlights, IPL 2026: RCB become 1st team to qualify for playoffs, beat PBKS by 23 runs
candidate_audit.summary: PBKS vs RCB Highlights, IPL 2026: Rasikh Salam Dar took three wickets, Virat Kohli and Venkatesh Iyer got half-centuries as RCB defeated PBKS by 23 runs. The result also saw RCB become the first team to qualify for the playoffs.

candidate_audit.title: Why Punjab Kings don't look like the same team that started IPL 2026: Home venue change, poor fielding or bad luck
candidate_audit.summary: Punjab Kings have lost five consecutive matches after a strong start in IPL 2026, revealing issues in their batting and death bowling.

candidate_audit.title: IPL 2026 Playoff Scenarios: With 7 matches to go, SRH and GT qualify; final spot up for grabs
candidate_audit.summary: With seven games left, Royal Challengers Bangalore, Gujarat Titans, and Sunrisers Hyderabad have secured playoff spots. Lucknow Super Giants and Mumbai Indians are out. Rajasthan Royals are in a strong position. Punjab Kings, Kolkata Knight Riders, Delhi Capitals, and Chennai Super Kings have slim hopes. The race for the remaining spots is intense with many possible outcomes.

candidate_audit.title: IPL 2026: SRH qualify for playoffs after beating CSK by 5 wickets
candidate_audit.summary: Sunrisers Hyderabad qualified for the IPL 2026 playoffs after a five-wicket win over Chennai Super Kings at Chepauk. Ishan Kishan scored 70 and added 75 runs with Heinrich Klaasen (47) in the chase of 181. Earlier, Pat Cummins starred with 3/28 as SRH joined Royal Challengers Bengaluru and Gujarat Titans in the playoffs.

candidate_audit.title: Ruturaj says CSK will return as 'stronger unit' as IPL 2026 playoff hopes fade
Watch: Dhoni enters field at Chepauk for final home appearance of IPL 2026
candidate_audit.summary: MS Dhoni thrilled Chepauk fans with a brief on-field appearance during CSK’s final home game of IPL 2026 against Sunrisers Hyderabad, despite missing the match through injury. The emotional moment came during the mid-innings team photo. Earlier, Ravi Shastri confirmed through Ruturaj Gaikwad that Dhoni was still unfit, while CSK managed 180/7 batting first.

MS Dhoni leaves CSK fans fearing last walk in Yellow after emotional thank you lap in Chepauk

candidate_audit.title: KKR under BCCI's scrutiny for using Varun Chakaravarthy despite reported hairline fracture
candidate_audit.summary: KKR under scrutiny for using injured bowler Varun Chakravarthy during IPL 2026.

candidate_audit.title: ‘Sanju Samson could be captain next year’: Brink-hit CSK urged to rethink Ruturaj Gaikwad after poor form
candidate_audit.summary: On a tricky Chepauk surface, Ruturaj Gaikwad struggled to 18 off 21 balls as Chennai lost by five wickets in their final home game of IPL 2026

candidate_audit.title: Punjab Kings co-owner drops major WPL entry hint: ‘Not investing initially was never a lack of belief'
candidate_audit.summary: Women’s cricket has surged in popularity, especially after the launch of the Women’s Premier League (WPL) in 2023.

candidate_audit.title: MS Dhoni’s CSK return hopes dashed by Sunil Gavaskar even as Chepauk waits with bated breath
candidate_audit.summary: Sunil Gavaskar has ruled out MS Dhoni's participation in tonight's CSK vs SRH IPL 2026 game.

candidate_audit.title: Starc, openers shine in DC win as Royals playoffs anxiety grows
candidate_audit.summary: Delhi Capitals secured a much-needed win against Rajasthan Royals by five wickets, ending their home struggles in IPL 2026.

candidate_audit.title: Brutal burden on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi: Teenage shoulders carrying Rajasthan Royals’ playoff dreams a huge red flag
candidate_audit.summary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, a 15-year-old opener for Rajasthan Royals, has scored 440 runs in IPL 2026, significantly impacting the team's playoff chances.

candidate_audit.title: ‘I felt blessed’: Ishan Kishan dedicates playoff-clinching knock to grieving cousin - Watch
candidate_audit.summary: Ishan Kishan's match-winning 70 against Sunrisers Hyderabad was fueled by a personal tragedy, as he aimed to finish the game for his grieving cousin present in the stands. Despite a challenging Chepauk pitch, Kishan's composed innings anchored SRH's chase, securing their playoff spot. He felt a sense of power, dedicating the victory to his family.

candidate_audit.title: Ishan Kishan’s whistle taunt at Chepauk crowd goes viral after SRH beat CSK - Watch
candidate_audit.summary: Ishan Kishan's brilliant 70 powered Sunrisers Hyderabad into the playoffs, defeating Chennai Super Kings. After a match-winning performance, Kishan engaged with the home crowd with a celebratory gesture. He revealed his innings was motivated by his cousin's presence, who was there during a difficult family time. The wicketkeeper-batter emphasized his goal to finish the game for his family.

candidate_audit.title: One last time in yellow? MS Dhoni leaves Chepauk emotional after SRH defeat
candidate_audit.summary: Sunrisers Hyderabad defeated Chennai Super Kings at Chepauk. Fans remained long after the match. They hoped to see MS Dhoni one last time. Dhoni did not play due to fitness. His presence held significance beyond cricket. The crowd showed gratitude for his contributions. The possibility of his final appearance left many emotional.

candidate_audit.title: 'It doesn't matter whether Dhoni plays': Manjrekar gets brutally honest
candidate_audit.summary: Despite missing IPL 2026 due to multiple injuries, MS Dhoni remained the centre of attention for CSK. Former India batter Sanjay Manjrekar criticised the franchise for becoming too emotional over Dhoni instead of focusing on results and team balance. While praising Dhoni’s legacy, Manjrekar said CSK must prioritise performances and reality over sentiment moving forward.

candidate_audit.title: 'Dhoni, where is he?': Shashtri sends Chepauk crowd into frenzy- Watch
candidate_audit.summary: Former India coach Ravi Shastri sent Chepauk into a frenzy during the toss by asking Ruturaj Gaikwad if MS Dhoni would play against Sunrisers Hyderabad. The CSK skipper confirmed Dhoni is “not fit enough” due to a calf strain. The must-win IPL 2026 clash carried huge playoff implications for both CSK and SRH.

candidate_audit.title: Madhav Tiwari: The ‘ziddi’ boy who only wanted to bat, but became a match-winner with the ball
candidate_audit.summary: Delhi Capitals youngster Madhav Tiwari has made an impressive start to his IPL 2026 journey, delivering impactful performances in his first two matches. The 22-year-old contributed with both bat and ball in crucial wins against Punjab Kings and Rajasthan Royals. But behind Madhav’s rise is the story of a stubborn youngster who only wanted to bat before former India cricketer Amay Khurasiya pushed him towards bowling as well. Today, that decision is helping Madhav emerge as an important player for Delhi Capitals in pressure situations.
